chain.title: Phone Interview Process
chain.titleCn: 对话链：电话面试全流程

title: Chain 1/8: Schedule Phone Screen
scene: 招聘专员来电，约三十分钟电话初筛。（对话链：电话面试）

turns.cn: 您好，我是ABC科技招聘，看到您投了后端工程师。
turns.en: Hi, I'm recruiting at ABC Tech. I saw your application for back-end engineer.

turns.cn: 您好，有兴趣，现在方便聊几分钟吗？
turns.en: Hello. I'm interested. Is now a good time for a few minutes?

turns.cn: 想约三十分钟电话初筛，您什么时候方便？
turns.en: I'd like to schedule a thirty-minute phone screen. When works for you?

turns.cn: 周三或周四下午都行，东部时间。
turns.en: Wednesday or Thursday afternoon works. Eastern time.

turns.cn: 好，周四两点，我会发日历邀请。
turns.en: Great. Thursday at two PM. I'll send a calendar invite.

turns.cn: 收到，谢谢。
turns.en: Got it. Thank you.

chain.title: Phone Interview Process
chain.titleCn: 对话链：电话面试全流程

title: Chain 2/8: HR Phone Screen
scene: HR 电话初筛，问背景和入职时间。（对话链：电话面试）

turns.cn: 感谢接听，先请您简单自我介绍。
turns.en: Thanks for taking the call. Could you briefly introduce yourself?

turns.cn: 我是张伟，五年Java开发，最近在做支付系统。
turns.en: I'm Zhang Wei. Five years in Java, recently on payment systems.

turns.cn: 为什么看新机会？
turns.en: Why are you looking for a new role?

turns.cn: 想在大一点的平台做分布式系统。
turns.en: I want to work on distributed systems at a larger scale.

turns.cn: 薪资期望？最早入职？
turns.en: Salary expectations? Earliest start date?

turns.cn: 年薪十二到十四万，两周通知期后可入职。
turns.en: One twenty to one forty base. Available after two weeks' notice.

chain.title: Phone Interview Process
chain.titleCn: 对话链：电话面试全流程

title: Chain 3/8: Technical Phone Interview
scene: 工程师打电话做技术面试，让你讲项目。（对话链：电话面试）

turns.cn: 我是团队Tech Lead，讲一个您最自豪的项目。
turns.en: I'm the tech lead. Walk me through a project you're proud of.

turns.cn: 去年做了订单服务重构，QPS从五百升到三千。
turns.en: Last year I rebuilt our order service. QPS went from five hundred to three thousand.

turns.cn: 最大技术挑战是什么？
turns.en: What was the biggest technical challenge?

turns.cn: 数据迁移零停机，用了双写和灰度切换。
turns.en: Zero-downtime migration. We used dual writes and a gradual cutover.

turns.cn: 您个人负责哪块？
turns.en: What did you own personally?

turns.cn: 架构设计和核心模块开发，带两名同事。
turns.en: Architecture and core modules. I led two engineers.

chain.title: Phone Interview Process
chain.titleCn: 对话链：电话面试全流程

title: Chain 4/8: Didn't Hear the Question
scene: 技术面试中信号不好，你没听清问题。（对话链：电话面试）

turns.cn: ……缓存一致性……怎么处理？
turns.en: …cache consistency… how would you handle it?

turns.cn: 不好意思，刚才没听清，能再说一遍吗？
turns.en: Sorry, I didn't catch that. Could you repeat the question?

turns.cn: 如果缓存和数据库不一致怎么办？
turns.en: What if the cache and database are out of sync?

turns.cn: 我会用TTL加消息队列失效缓存，关键读走主库。
turns.en: I'd use TTL plus a queue to invalidate cache. Critical reads hit the primary DB.

turns.cn: 好，继续。
turns.en: Good. Let's move on.

chain.title: Phone Interview Process
chain.titleCn: 对话链：电话面试全流程

title: Chain 5/8: Behavioral Question
scene: 面试官问团队合作和冲突处理。（对话链：电话面试）

turns.cn: 说一次和同事意见不合怎么解决的。
turns.en: Tell me about a disagreement with a coworker and how you resolved it.

turns.cn: 和产品经理在排期上有分歧，我列了风险数据，一起砍了次要功能。
turns.en: I disagreed with a PM on timeline. I shared risk data and we cut minor features together.

turns.cn: 您最大的弱点是什么？
turns.en: What's your greatest weakness?

turns.cn: 有时太追求完美，现在在学着按时交付MVP。
turns.en: I can be perfectionist. I'm learning to ship MVPs on time.

turns.cn: 谢谢，我让HR跟进下一步。
turns.en: Thank you. HR will follow up on next steps.

chain.title: Phone Interview Process
chain.titleCn: 对话链：电话面试全流程

title: Chain 6/8: Hiring Manager Call
scene: 用人经理打电话，聊团队匹配和你的问题。（对话链：电话面试）

turns.cn: 我们团队十二人，敏捷开发，您习惯吗？
turns.en: We're twelve people, agile. Does that fit how you work?

turns.cn: 习惯，我过去四年都是Scrum。
turns.en: Yes. I've done Scrum for four years.

turns.cn: 您有什么问题问我？
turns.en: What questions do you have for me?

turns.cn: 成功入职三个月的标准是什么？
turns.en: What does success look like in the first three months?

turns.cn: 独立负责一个服务，参与on-call轮值。
turns.en: Own a service independently and join the on-call rotation.

turns.cn: 明白了，很有挑战性，我感兴趣。
turns.en: Clear and challenging. I'm very interested.

chain.title: Phone Interview Process
chain.titleCn: 对话链：电话面试全流程

title: Chain 7/8: Offer Phone Call
scene: 招聘来电通知通过，口头讲offer条件。（对话链：电话面试）

turns.cn: 恭喜，团队想发offer，年薪十三万base。
turns.en: Congratulations. The team wants to offer you. Base salary one thirty thousand.

turns.cn: 谢谢！职位我很感兴趣，奖金结构呢？
turns.en: Thank you! I'm excited about the role. How is bonus structured?

turns.cn: 目标奖金百分之十五，股票四年vest。
turns.en: Target bonus fifteen percent. Equity vests over four years.

turns.cn: 福利和入职日期呢？
turns.en: What about benefits and start date?

turns.cn: 标准医保，入职可商量，书面offer今晚发。
turns.en: Standard health plan. Start date flexible. Written offer tonight.

turns.cn: 好，我看完回复您。
turns.en: Great. I'll review and get back to you.

chain.title: Phone Interview Process
chain.titleCn: 对话链：电话面试全流程

title: Chain 8/8: Negotiate on Phone
scene: 你回电招聘，礼貌谈判薪资和入职日。（对话链：电话面试）

turns.cn: 感谢offer，根据市场和我经验，期望base十四万。
turns.en: Thanks for the offer. Based on market and my experience, I'm hoping for one forty base.

turns.cn: 我申请一下，可能到十三万五。
turns.en: I'll check. We might get to one thirty-five.

turns.cn: 如果可以十三万五，我接受，三周后入职。
turns.en: If we can do one thirty-five, I'll accept. Start in three weeks.

turns.cn: 我去确认，明天给您答复。
turns.en: Let me confirm. I'll call you tomorrow.

turns.cn: 好，期待加入团队。
turns.en: Sounds good. I'm looking forward to joining.

turns.cn: 我们也是，明天聊。
turns.en: Us too. Talk tomorrow.
